title: Offenses committed prior to effective date of Code
doc_html:
PART VIII.  CONCLUDING PROVISIONS

§142.  Offenses committed prior to effective date of Code

This Code shall not apply to any crimes committed before July 29, 1942.  Crimes committed before that time shall be governed by the law existing at the time the crime was committed.
doc_text:
PART VIII.  CONCLUDING PROVISIONS
§142.  Offenses committed prior to effective date of Code
This Code shall not apply to any crimes committed before July 29, 1942.  Crimes committed before that time shall be governed by the law existing at the time the crime was committed.
